name: Antwerp Diamonds - Roswell's Jewelry, Diamonds, Watches, Pawn Loans
description_short: Luxury goods buyer specializing in high-end watches, jewelry, and designer handbags with instant cash payouts across five U.S. locations.
description_long:
Antwerp Diamonds operates as a luxury goods purchasing service, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional pawn shops by focusing exclusively on authenticated high-end items. The company was founded to serve consumers looking to convert luxury assets into immediate cash, operating physical offices in Atlanta (Buckhead and Roswell), Las Vegas, Fort Lauderdale, and Houston.

The company's core offering involves purchasing luxury watches, jewelry, and designer handbags from prestigious brands including Rolex, Cartier, Hermès, Chanel, Patek Philippe, and Louis Vuitton. Their stated process follows three steps: free evaluation (online or in-person), transparent offer based on market data, and instant payment via cash or secure transfer. The website displays recent acquisitions with values ranging from $3,000 to $192,000, including a Panthère de Cartier watch sold for $26,200 and an Audemars Piguet Royal Oak for $192,000. They also purchase fine materials including gold, silver, and diamonds independent of branded items.

Antwerp Diamonds differentiates itself through expert evaluation by specialists with stated market insight, emphasis on private appointments and discretion, and no hidden fees policy. Their website highlights a 5.0 Google review rating and includes a customer testimonial from Tiffany Neal praising accuracy and fair valuations compared to competitors. They offer both online preliminary evaluations with insured shipping and in-person appointments at their physical locations.

As a luxury goods buyer rather than a traditional lender, this service carries important caveats: there is no credit component, no loan terms or interest rates, and no ability to reclaim items post-sale. The valuations are subject to authentication and condition assessment, and customers should understand they are selling assets at potentially below retail value. The company's legitimacy depends entirely on accurate authentication and fair market pricing.
address: 861 Holcomb Bridge Rd Suite 105, Roswell, GA 30076

company_info.headquarters: 861 Holcomb Bridge Rd Suite 105, Roswell, GA 30076

pros: Instant payment upon acceptance of offer (cash or secure transfer)
Free preliminary evaluations available online with no obligation to sell
Expert authentication and valuation based on condition, authenticity, and market demand
Private appointment availability at multiple locations (Atlanta, Las Vegas, Fort Lauderdale, Houston)
Purchases wide range of luxury brands (Rolex, Cartier, Hermès, Chanel, Patek Philippe, Louis Vuitton)
Also buys fine materials independently (gold, silver, diamonds)
Offers insured shipping for online sales and remote evaluations
No hidden fees policy explicitly stated
cons: Not a loan product—items are sold permanently with no reclaim option
Valuations are subject to authentication verification; items may be rejected if not authentic
Selling luxury items typically yields less than retail or original purchase price
Las Vegas location requires appointment-only access, limiting walk-in convenience
Limited geographic footprint (five locations across four states) compared to national pawn chains
best_for: Individuals with authentic luxury watches, jewelry, or designer handbags needing immediate cash
High-net-worth consumers seeking discretionary liquidity without traditional financing
People liquidating inherited or unwanted luxury goods from premium brands
Those who prefer expert authentication and market-based valuations over generalist pawn shops
diagnosis: Antwerp Diamonds is best for consumers with genuine luxury assets who need immediate cash and understand they are selling items at liquidation value, not retail price. The main caveat is that this is a sale, not a loan—items cannot be reclaimed—and success depends entirely on the company's authentication accuracy and valuation fairness, which cannot be verified from the website alone.
services: Free online preliminary evaluation of luxury watches
Free in-person evaluation at five U.S. office locations
Purchase and instant cash payment for luxury watches (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet)
Purchase and instant cash payment for fine jewelry (diamonds, emeralds, gold pieces)
Purchase and instant cash payment for designer handbags (Hermès, Chanel, Louis Vuitton)
Gold, silver, and precious material purchasing independent of branded items
Expert authentication assessment for luxury goods
Condition grading evaluation (items documented on 5-point condition scale)
Market-based offer generation without obligation to sell
Immediate payment via cash or secure transfer upon offer acceptance
Insured shipping for remote online sales transactions
Private appointment scheduling (especially at Las Vegas location)
places_editorial_summary: Basic jewelry dealer with rings, necklaces, bracelets & more, plus custom work & watch repairs.
